MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Nasir Patel'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses To Deem Matters Admitted And To Request Sanctions.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. The motion is granted. The Pro Tem Judge has e-mailed the tentative decision to plaintiff and overnighted the tentative decision to the defendant (since the defendant does not have an e-mail on file with the Court). Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)
